mapper.select: select (case degree when 1 then '初中' when 2 then '高中' when 3 then '大专' when 4 then '本科' when 5 then '硕士' when 6 then '博士' else '其他' end) name, count(*) value from student group by degree;
select s.*, c.name clazzName from student s left join clazz c on s.clazz_id = c.id where s.id = #{id};
mapper.delete:
delete from student where id in
#{id}
